name: Independent Parties — No Partnership or Agency
text: Nothing in this Agreement shall be deemed to create any partnership, joint venture, or employment relationship between the Parties unless expressly stated.

legal_basis.note: Agency — authority to act for principal

invalid_if: Agreement creates implied partnership without intent
source: Indian Partnership Act, 1932; Indian Contract Act, 1872
title: Independent Parties
dispute_hotspots: Tax authority treats arrangement as partnership — tax liability implications
Third party relies on apparent authority — principal bound by agent's act
